Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The problem asks me to compare two event logs Group A Protected Group and Group B Unprotected Group I need to identify which log exhibits bias and explain how

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The unprotected Group B log shows clear bias

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The LocalResident attribute TRUE and CommunityGroup field trigger a 10 ScoreAdjustment for members of Highland Civic Darts Club while the protected Group A cases LocalResident FALSE CommunityGroup None receive a flat 0 adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 695 and 720 preliminary scores in Group B are lifted to 705 and 730 and approved whereas identical or higher preliminary scores in Group A stay unboosted
